st":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3579635564031016","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"1.407557e+07"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603230543150189B6191EECBA817C4D"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读4小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":52,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":14075,"reply_count":5,"show_pv":35136},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7310619570469274402","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"我很喜欢这本书，我一直都在跟着作者更新的进度在看这本书是我第一本看的小说，它不像是别的书一直是开挂，它是在讲一个家庭幸福美满的生活，充满了活力虽然在之后一直断更，至少作者给写完了，遗憾的事作者并没有把前面的一些剧情节补上，我希望作者能够在恢复之后能够继续补上（真心的说）希望作者能够早日康复继续写下更好的作品，我真心觉得这本书很好看，也有一些幽默风趣，总之别人说不如自己去看的出来的感觉真实，作者你加油💪"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1702138088,"group_id":"7138982679633988620","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"我成为了番茄作者，想再书上赚钱，更想写出完美的小说让大家都爱","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nzl46fmT/le/ADs6d7wQkvTTwMf4iMij/Ehmx7l1HjWs","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/aefc23e02d944193929306b7c28900a9~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776793860&x-signature=U0RCzwQESJ896WxbauGzCxduWvE%3D","user_id":"3065914358512340","user_name":"风之云烟"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3065914358512340","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color"
